rules.rule_text:
rule xtremrat : rat
{
	meta:
		author = "Jean-Philippe Teissier / @Jipe_"
		description = "Xtrem RAT v3.5"
		date = "2012-07-12"
		version = "1.0"
		filetype = "memory"

	strings:
		$a = "XTREME" wide
		$b = "XTREMEBINDER" wide
		$c = "STARTSERVERBUFFER" wide
		$d = "SOFTWARE\\XtremeRAT" wide
		$e = "XTREMEUPDATE" wide
		$f = "XtremeKeylogger" wide
		$g = "myversion|3.5" wide
		$h = "xtreme rat" wide nocase

	condition:
		2 of them
}
